response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches 'Our Bright Parade' for the first half, followed by a brief 'THE BADDEST' (K/DA) vocal intro and then the full song 'FACT' by Tokoyami Towa. 2. The Reference JSON was partially incorrect; it identified 'THE BADDEST' as the main song, but audio analysis confirms the majority is 'FACT'. 3. The provided JSON lyrics for 'Our Bright Parade' were discarded as they didn't match the specific verses sung in this medley; I transcribed the actual lyrics from the audio. 4. Subtitles cover the full 5:01 duration, with gaps for pure instrumental sections, as required.

subtitles.original: 君と歩む物語なんだ
subtitles.english: It's a story I walk with you

subtitles.original: 「ただいま」を聞けば
subtitles.english: If I hear "I'm home"

subtitles.original: 「おかえり」って叫ぶよ
subtitles.english: I'll shout "Welcome back"

subtitles.original: 当たり前じゃないから
subtitles.english: Because it's not something to be taken for granted

subtitles.original: Parade, parade, parade! 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! We're gonna shine

subtitles.original: 呼び合う声を合図に
subtitles.english: With the voices calling out as our signal

subtitles.original: Parade, parade, parade! 暗がりを満たすのは
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! Filling the darkness is...

subtitles.original: 君と僕だ
subtitles.english: ...you and me

subtitles.original: Parade, parade, parade! 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! We're gonna shine

subtitles.original: 悔しさも愛しさも
subtitles.english: Both the frustrations and the affections

subtitles.original: 連れておいで
subtitles.english: Bring them along

subtitles.original: Parade, parade, parade! 探しに行く
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! Going to search

subtitles.original: 風、夢、羽、飛び乗ってさ
subtitles.english: Riding on the wind, dreams, and wings

subtitles.original: ささやかな光
subtitles.english: A modest light

subtitles.original: さぁ、ここからが僕らの
subtitles.english: Now, from here starts our...

subtitles.original: 素敵なスタートさ
subtitles.english: ...wonderful start

subtitles.original: 君と 飛び込んでゆく
subtitles.english: Diving in with you...

subtitles.original: ここから Parade, parade, parade!
subtitles.english: ...from here, Parade, parade, parade!

subtitles.original: セブンスフェス！ ステージ4、スタートです！
subtitles.english: 7th Fes! Stage 4, starting now!

subtitles.original: Watch out!
subtitles.english: Watch out!

subtitles.original: Warning! Warning! I'm the baddest
subtitles.english: Warning! Warning! I'm the baddest

subtitles.original: Warning! Warning! I'm the baddest
subtitles.english: Warning! Warning! I'm the baddest

subtitles.original: ホロライブ、セブンスフェス！
subtitles.english: Hololive, 7th Fes!

subtitles.original: 幕張！ 最後のステージだ！
subtitles.english: Makuhari! It's the final stage!

subtitles.original: 君から見れば 僕は世間
subtitles.english: From your perspective, I'm just the world

subtitles.original: 理不尽な事案黙って過ごす恐怖を待つ
subtitles.english: Silently enduring unfair incidents, waiting for fear

subtitles.original: 光って見れば 露わな貴方に
subtitles.english: When viewed with light, to the exposed you

subtitles.original: 行うと誓った ところでしょうもない
subtitles.english: I vowed to carry it out, but it's no use now

subtitles.original: 変わって変わらぬ 心の中から響く
subtitles.english: Resonating from within a heart that changes yet stays the same

subtitles.original: 嘘たちが違かったと ただ青空を眺めて
subtitles.english: Saying the lies were different, just gazing at the blue sky

subtitles.original: 明日を重ねてゆく
subtitles.english: Piling up the tomorrows

subtitles.original: 思い出してしまうのに
subtitles.english: Even though I end up remembering

subtitles.original: 誤魔化してしまうのは
subtitles.english: The reason I keep deceiving myself

subtitles.original: 確かにあった後悔から
subtitles.english: Is because of the regrets that certainly existed

subtitles.original: あぁ 違ったんだってさよならさよなら
subtitles.english: Ah, saying it was different, goodbye, goodbye

subtitles.original: 光に触れるたび 濁ってしまうよね
subtitles.english: Every time I touch the light, it becomes muddy, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: 止まってしまうの
subtitles.english: It just comes to a stop

subtitles.original: 震える my body 逃げる瞬間ばかり
subtitles.english: My body is trembling, always moments of running away

subtitles.original: 嘘で染まったような日々じゃ響かないと 君は笑って
subtitles.english: Smiling and saying it won't resonate in days stained with lies

subtitles.original: また夜明けを待つの 君の中のフレーバー
subtitles.english: Waiting for the dawn again, the flavor within you

subtitles.original: 何もないまま また道を歩いている
subtitles.english: Walking the path again with nothing

subtitles.original: 迷い空を重ねて 解き放した正体
subtitles.english: Piling up the lost skies, the identity I've released

subtitles.original: 誤魔化しきれなかった 心が求める熱を
subtitles.english: The heat my heart seeks that I couldn't fully hide

subtitles.original: 憧れが照らした
subtitles.english: Illuminated by longing

subtitles.original: 明日を重ねてゆく
subtitles.english: Piling up the tomorrows

subtitles.original: 思い出してしまうのに
subtitles.english: Even though I end up remembering

subtitles.original: 誤魔化してしまうのは
subtitles.english: The reason I keep deceiving myself

subtitles.original: 大人になった後悔から
subtitles.english: Because of the regrets of having become an adult

subtitles.original: あぁ 月明かりの夜はさよならさよなら
subtitles.english: Ah, on the moonlit night, goodbye, goodbye

subtitles.original: 光を繋ぐたび 濁ってしまうよね
subtitles.english: Every time I connect the light, it becomes muddy, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: 歩んでいく道より今を 移ろい焦がしてしまう日々を
subtitles.english: More than the path I walk, the days where I drift and yearn for the now

subtitles.original: あぁ 私はまだ止まらない
subtitles.english: Ah, I won't stop yet

subtitles.original: 夜空に浮かぶ月の光を 見上げるランウェイ
subtitles.english: Running the runway, looking up at the moonlight in the night sky

subtitles.original: 星の方へ 行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go towards the stars

subtitles.original: 道標にして 帰る場所へ
subtitles.english: Making them my signpost to the place I return to

subtitles.english: Piling up the tomorrows
